title: [Rumor Woods, Viewing Stands]
description: Painted with splashes of beige and myrtle green, it is standing room only at this end of the race track viewing stands.  Covering the oak plank floor, a mixture of confetti and sawdust is used to soak up the spilled ale from which a constant sour odor rises.  An enormous stuffed scorpion pierced through the eyes with a white arrow hangs above a set of steps leading down from the stands.

Painted with splashes of gold and hunter green, it is standing room only at this end of the race track viewing stands.  Covering the oak plank floor, a mixture of confetti and sawdust is used to soak up the spilled ale from which a constant sour odor rises.  An enormous stuffed wolf head pierced through the eye with a golden arrow hangs above a set of steps leading down from the stands.
